title: Harness Ticket — Field Glossary v1
note: Human-readable reference only. Executable validator: ticket-validator.json (constraint adjacency map). Normalizer: scripts/ticket-normalizer.js. All baton roles are AI agents; human = design decisions + UAT. Agile role map: manager=ProductOwner, collaborator=Developer, admin=QA/DevOps, consultant=Architect/Reviewer. GitHub is the system of record; governance is overlaid via labels and body conventions. Validator uses a value-keyed constraint adjacency map: each property value carries sub-maps of permitted sibling values (scalar=exact, array=any-of, absent=unconstrained).

normalized_shape.note: Object shape after ticket-normalizer.js preprocessing. This is what the validator receives.

assignees.note: GitHub logins and/or AI agent slugs (copilot, devin, cursor, codex, factory).

governance.note: Extracted from GitHub labels (prefix:value). Validator enforces compound-key rules here.

resolution.cardinality: zero-or-one (null on open, required on close)

github_native_fields_not_in_normalized.note: Available in raw GitHub API response but not passed to validator. Retain for dashboard and audit use.
github_native_fields_not_in_normalized.performed_via_github_app: github:performed_via_github_app — set when AI agent app acted on issue

handoff_artifact.note: Not a label or body field. Posted as a structured GitHub comment at each role transition.
handoff_artifact.purpose: Baton audit trail. Enables post-hoc reconstruction of which agent acted and when.
